---
subcategory : "Cloud Project"
---

# ovh_cloud_instance_images

Retrieves the available instance images in a public cloud project (APIv2).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "ovh_cloud_instance_images" "debian" {
  service_name = "YYYY"
  region_name  = "GRA7"
  name         = "Debian 12"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Required

- `service_name` (String) Service name
- `region_name` (String) Region name

### Optional

- `name` (String) Filter images by name (regexp match, e.g. `Debian 13`)

### Read-Only

- `images` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--images))

<a id="nestedatt--images"></a>

### Nested Schema for `images`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Image ID
- `name` (String) Image name
- `status` (String) Image status (active, queued, saving, etc.)
- `visibility` (String) Image visibility (public, private, shared, community)
- `min_disk` (Number) Minimum disk size in GB
- `min_ram` (Number) Minimum RAM in MB
- `size` (Number) Image size in bytes
- `created_at` (String) Image creation date
- `updated_at` (String) Image last update date
